---
title: "165: Blowouts"
date: "2025-12-22"
categories:
  - gtUtils
  - ggbeeswarm
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Code"
editor: visual
---

### Load data

-   <div>

    ```{r load-data, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
    library(rlang)
    library(cbbplotR)

    cfbpl <- readr::read_csv("cfbpl.csv")

    all_stats <- readr::read_csv("torvik_stats.csv")

    # function to save table 
    gt_save_crop <- function(data, file = NULL, bg = "white", whitespace = 50, zoom = 2, expand = 5) {
      tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
      
      # Wrap the gtsave_extra call in a tryCatch to handle errors
      tryCatch({
        gtExtras::gtsave_extra(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
      }, error = function(e) {
        # If there's an error, try using regular gt::gtsave instead
        message("gtsave_extra failed, trying gt::gtsave...")
        gt::gtsave(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
      })
      
      magick::image_read(tmp) |> 
        magick::image_trim() |> 
        magick::image_border(bg, glue::glue('{whitespace}x{whitespace}')) |> 
        magick::image_write(file)
      unlink(tmp)
    }
    ```

    </div>

### Blowout table

```{r blowout-tbl, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

fball_header <- glue::glue(
  "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
      <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/redesign/assets/img/icons/ESPN-icon-football-college.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
     <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
       <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>College Football Playoffs: Average Margin of Victory by Round</span>
       <span style='font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'><br>
       Shows the average margin of victory by each round in the CFP Era.</span>
     </div>
     <div>
       <img src='https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/1/18/Logo_of_college_football_playoff.svg'
       style='height: 60px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
   </div>
  <br>"
)

gt_table <- cfbpl |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    season = Season,
    winner = Team,
    win_pts = Pts,
    loser = Opp., 
    loser_pts = PtsO, 
    diff = PtDif...14, 
    round = Round...16
  ) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    winner = dplyr::case_match(winner,
                               "Miami (FL)" ~ "Miami",
                               "Texas Christian" ~ "TCU",
                               .default = winner
    ),
    loser = dplyr::case_match(loser,
                              "Texas Christian" ~ "TCU",
                              .default = loser
    )
  ) |> 
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(winner, winner, 
                         include_name = FALSE, 
                         logo_height = 15) |> 
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(loser, loser, 
                         include_name = FALSE,
                         logo_height = 15) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    score_sen = paste0(winner, " ", win_pts, "-", loser_pts, " ", loser)
  ) |> 
  dplyr::group_by(season, round) |> 
  dplyr::summarise(
    avg_diff = round(mean(diff), 1),
    score_sen = paste(score_sen, collapse = "<br>"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |> 
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = season,
    values_from = c(avg_diff, score_sen),
    names_sep = "_"
  ) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(
      dplyr::starts_with("avg_diff_"),
      ~ dplyr::if_else(is.na(.x), "—", as.character(.x))
    ),
    dplyr::across(
      dplyr::starts_with("score_sen_"),
      ~ tidyr::replace_na(.x, "") 
    )
  ) |> 
  dplyr::arrange(round) |> 
  dplyr::select(
    round,
    dplyr::starts_with("avg_diff_2025"), dplyr::starts_with("score_sen_2025"),
    dplyr::starts_with("avg_diff_2024"), dplyr::starts_with("score_sen_2024"),
    dplyr::starts_with("avg_diff_2023"), dplyr::starts_with("score_sen_2023"),
    dplyr::starts_with("avg_diff_2022"), dplyr::starts_with("score_sen_2022"),
    dplyr::starts_with("avg_diff_2021"), dplyr::starts_with("score_sen_2021"),
    dplyr::starts_with("avg_diff_2020"), dplyr::starts_with("score_sen_2020"),
    dplyr::starts_with("avg_diff_2019"), dplyr::starts_with("score_sen_2019"),
    dplyr::starts_with("avg_diff_2018"), dplyr::starts_with("score_sen_2018"),
    dplyr::starts_with("avg_diff_2017"), dplyr::starts_with("score_sen_2017"),
    dplyr::starts_with("avg_diff_2016"), dplyr::starts_with("score_sen_2016"),
    dplyr::starts_with("avg_diff_2015"), dplyr::starts_with("score_sen_2015"),
    dplyr::starts_with("avg_diff_2014"), dplyr::starts_with("score_sen_2014")
  ) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    round = dplyr::case_match(round,
            1 ~ "1st Round  \nSemifinals",
            2 ~ "Quarterfinals",
            3 ~ "Semifinals", 
            4 ~ "Championship")
  ) |> 
  gt::gt() |> 
  gt::fmt_markdown(columns = gt::everything()) |> 
  gtUtils::gt_column_subheaders(
    avg_diff_2025 = list(heading = "2025", subtitle = "12 teams"),
    avg_diff_2024 = list(heading = "2024", subtitle = "12 teams"),
    avg_diff_2023 = list(heading = "2023", subtitle = "4 teams"),
    avg_diff_2022 = list(heading = "2022", subtitle = "4 teams"),
    avg_diff_2021 = list(heading = "2021", subtitle = "4 teams"),
    avg_diff_2020 = list(heading = "2020", subtitle = "4 teams"),
    avg_diff_2019 = list(heading = "2019", subtitle = "4 teams"),
    avg_diff_2018 = list(heading = "2018", subtitle = "4 teams"),
    avg_diff_2017 = list(heading = "2017", subtitle = "4 teams"),
    avg_diff_2016 = list(heading = "2016", subtitle = "4 teams"),
    avg_diff_2015 = list(heading = "2015", subtitle = "4 teams"),
    avg_diff_2014 = list(heading = "2014", subtitle = "4 teams"),
    heading_color = "black",
    subtitle_color = "gray"
  )


for(year in 2025:2014) {
  gt_table <- gt_table |> 
    gtExtras::gt_merge_stack(
      col1 = !!rlang::sym(paste0("avg_diff_", year)),
      col2 = !!rlang::sym(paste0("score_sen_", year)),
      palette = c("black", "#666666"),  
      small_cap = FALSE,
      font_size = c("16px", "10px")
    )
}

year_cols <- paste0("avg_diff_", 2025:2014)

blow_tbl <- gt_table |> 
  gt::cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = dplyr::all_of(year_cols)
  ) |> 
  gt::cols_label(
    round = "Round"
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_style(
    style = gt::cell_text(align = "center"),
    locations = gt::cells_body(columns = dplyr::all_of(year_cols))
  ) |> 
  gtUtils::gt_theme_savant() |> 
  gt::tab_style(
    style = list(gt::cell_borders(
      sides = c("left", "right", "top", "bottom"),
      color = "black",
      weight = gt::px(2)
    )),
    locations = list(
      gt::cells_body(),
      gt::cells_column_labels(),
      gt::cells_row_groups()
    )
  ) |> 
  # Row 1 highlights
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = 1,
    columns = 2,
    fill = "#F2D4C2",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = 1,
    columns = c(4, 10, 12, 14, 16, 20),  # Consolidated
    fill = "#E8B5A0",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = 1,
    columns = 6,
    fill = "#8FA3B8",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = 1,
    columns = 8,
    fill = "#6B8CAE",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = 1,
    columns = 18,
    fill = "#B8C5D6",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = 1,
    columns = 22,
    fill = "#C17B7B",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) |> 
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = 1,
    columns = 24,
    fill = "#D49080",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) |> 
  # Row 2 highlights
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = 2,
    columns = 4,
    fill = "#F2D4C2",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) |> 
   gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = 2,
    columns = 2,
    fill = "#E8B5A0",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) |> 
  # Row 3 highlights
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = 3,
    columns = 4,
    fill = "#B8C5D6",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) |> 
  # Row 4 highlights
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = 4,
    columns = c(4, 10, 14),
    fill = "#F2D4C2",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) |> 
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = 4,
    columns = c(6, 16, 24),
    fill = "#D49080",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) |> 
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = 4,
    columns = 8,
    fill = "red",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) |> 
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = 4,
    columns = 12,  # Removed duplicate
    fill = "#C17B7B",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) |> 
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = 4,
    columns = c(18, 20, 22),
    fill = "#6B8CAE",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(fball_header)) |>
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note =
      gt::html(
        "<hr>Data via Stathead  | sports-reference.com | theme via {gtUtils} <br>
        Data for 2025 season through Quarterfinals Round of CFP<br>
        <hr><b>Table by Chris at Bless your chart</b>"
      )
  )

gt_save_crop(
  blow_tbl,
  file = "blowout_tbl.png",
  whitespace = 40,
  bg = "white"
)

blow_tbl
  
```

### Hoops beeswarm

```{r hoops-beeswarm, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

plot_data <- all_stats |>
  dplyr::filter(
    year > 2021,
    lubridate::month(date) == 11 | (lubridate::month(date) == 12 & lubridate::day(date) < 23)
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    margin = abs(pts - opp_pts),
    is_blowout = margin > 29.5
  )

labels_data <- plot_data |> 
  dplyr::group_by(year) |> 
  dplyr::summarize(
    n_total = dplyr::n(),
    n_blowouts = sum(is_blowout),
    pct_blowout = (n_blowouts / n_total) * 100,
    label_pos = max(plot_data$margin) + 2,
    label_text = paste0(
      n_blowouts, " blowouts  \n", n_total, " games\n",
      "(", round(pct_blowout, 1), "% of games)"
    )
  )

bee_plot <- plot_data |> 
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = factor(year), y = margin, color = is_blowout)) +
  ggbeeswarm::geom_quasirandom(alpha = 0.7, size = 2, width = 0.25) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 29.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "#333333", linewidth = 0.8) +
  ggplot2::geom_label(
    data = labels_data, 
    ggplot2::aes(x = factor(year), y = label_pos, label = label_text),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fontface = "bold",
    color = "#333333",
    fill = "white",
    family = "mono",
    label.size = 0,
    alpha = 0.8,
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#ffc9b5", "TRUE" = "#FF6B35")) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.2))) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "College Basketball: Blowouts in early season games",
    subtitle = "Margin of victory in games played before December 23 of each season.\nBlowout defined by a margin of 30+ points.",
    x = "",
    y = "Margin of Victory",
    caption = "data via barttorvik.com  \nViz by Chris at Bless your chart"
  ) +
  ggthemes::theme_few() +
  ggplot2::theme(
    text = ggplot2::element_text(family = "mono"),  # Global font family
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(color = "black", face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = ggplot2::element_line(color = "#f0f0f0", linewidth = 0.3)
  ) +
  ggplot2::coord_flip()

ggplot2::ggsave(
  "bee_plot.png",
  bee_plot,
  w = 10.5,
  h = 7.5,
  dpi = 300,
)

bee_plot

```
